zh-CN.name: 字母I
zh-CN.intro: 字母I是英语字母表里第九个字母，它看起来像一根小棍子，但作用可大啦！

story.title: 🎩字母I的故事
story.body: 字母I站得直直的，像个挺拔的小士兵。有一天，它觉得自己好孤单，就对朋友们说：“你们看，我没有弯弯的曲线，也没有圈圈，我只是一条竖线。”其他字母说：“才不是呢！你是字母里最高最直的！而且，很多重要的单词从你开始，比如Ice cream（冰淇淋）、I（我）。我们都很喜欢你！”字母I听了，开心地笑了。现在，它每天站在单词里，骄傲地发挥它的作用。小朋友，你找到身边的字母I了吗？

knowledge.title: 字母I的发音
knowledge.body: 字母I发/ai/音，就像我们唱“唉”一样。它是元音字母，可以发不同的音，比如在big里发/i/，在ice里发/ai/。字母I很重要，它帮助组成很多单词。

en.name: I
en.intro: Letter I is the ninth letter of the English alphabet. It looks like a little stick, but it's very useful!

story.title: 🎩Story of Letter I
story.body: Letter I stands very straight, like a tall little soldier. One day, it felt lonely and said to its friends, 'Look at me, I have no curves, no loops, I am just a straight line.' The other letters said, 'No way! You are the tallest and straightest of all letters! And many important words start with you, like Ice cream, I (myself). We all like you!' Letter I heard this and smiled happily. Now, every day, it stands proudly in words, playing its part. Little one, can you find the letter I around you?

knowledge.title: The Sound of Letter I
knowledge.body: Letter I makes the /aɪ/ sound, like saying 'eye'. It is a vowel letter and can make different sounds, like /ɪ/ in 'big' or /aɪ/ in 'ice'. Letter I is very important and helps form many words.
